title: The Enchanted Botanical Feast 2025: A night where art, flavour and nature unite
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Step into a world of wonder...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Step into a world of wonder as Hastag Celebrations and the Garden Route Botanical Garden present The Enchanted Botanical Feast 2025 - an unforgettable evening of art, music, and fine dining under the stars.


> On Friday, 28 November, the gardens will transform into a glowing wonderland, illuminated by fairy lights, lanterns and soft music drifting through the night air.


Guests will be welcomed with wine tastings, dance performances and live violin music as they stroll along candlelit pathways towards an elegantly set 200-seater long table.

Each corner of the garden will tell its own story - from the Wishing Tree and Moonlight Magic to Whispers of Wings, where guests can capture memories beside a stunning butterfly installation.

Art meets nature

Local artists Sophia Seegers, Karin Combrink, Art by Shania H,  Greta Helberg and Sea Love will showcase inspiring works throughout the garden, adding a creative touch to this already magical evening.

Sip and savour

Guests can indulge in curated tastings from: Calitzdorp Cellar • Van Loveren Family Vineyards • Posboom Distillers • Brand Republic Distributors • Perfect Water George • Fient Artisanal Ferments & Foods • Buffelsdrift Farm Olive Oils • De Rustica Olive Estate • The Deli at Mastro Dario

The long table elegantly seats 200 people.

A feast for the senses

The evening’s 4-course dinner, prepared by private chef Alretha, will pair seasonal dishes with hand-selected wines and music to match the mood - from a light cucumber and mint gazpacho with soft acoustic melodies, to the rich notes of a slow-braised oxtail cigar accompanied by soulful saxophone.

Enjoy a magical evening with good wine and good friends.

Live performances

Be serenaded by Minxz Smith on electric violin and Jaco Kriek on saxophone, while the talented dancers add graceful movement to the night’s rhythm. The evening will be elegantly hosted by MC Nikki du Toit, promising a seamless blend of elegance, entertainment and enchantment.

Event details

Date: 28 November 2025Time: 18:00 – 22:00Venue: Garden Route Botanical Garden, GeorgeSeats: Limited - advance booking essential

Don’t miss this once-a-year celebration where the Garden Route’s finest talents, tastes and natural beauty come together for one extraordinary night.

Reserve your seat here and be part of the magic.

Fine wines from Calitzdorp Cellar are also on the menu.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
